tweets.text: RT @Hitchslap1: Man with a 71 IQ was found incompetent to stand trial after randomly shooting at three people. Goes on to murder an 18-year…

retweet.text:
Man with a 71 IQ was found incompetent to stand trial after randomly shooting at three people. Goes on to murder an 18-year old college student.

The legal system is broken.

quoted.text:
This man was found incompetent to stand trial for randomly shooting into a car with three people in it, and he was just released onto an unwitting public in May 2023. He went on to murder an 18-year old college student five months later.

The reason he was originally declared incompetent and released? 

He had an IQ of 71. ~17.5% of black people have an IQ less than 71 assuming a normal distribution and a mean IQ of 85.

tweets.text: RT @WhiteHouse: The goal is not just to reach the Moon, but to stay. 🌘 https://t.co/5WPHYRNmeO

retweet.text: The goal is not just to reach the Moon, but to stay. 🌘 https://t.co/5WPHYRNmeO

quoted.text:
To return Americans to the Moon, NASA is shifting to an iterative, execution-focused approach – just as we did during Apollo. 

We are standardizing rocket architecture, embedding NASA expertise across industry, and increasing launch cadence to support sustained lunar operations.  

We are sending a demand signal for crewed missions beyond Artemis V, with at least two providers capable of bringing astronauts to the surface every 6 months. 

The goal is not just to reach the Moon, but to stay. 

America will never give up the Moon again.
